description: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.

name: Weedle

description: It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokémon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.

name: Pansage

description: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.
name: Chespin

description: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators' attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Quilladin

description: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.

name: Chesnaught

description: A common sight in volcanic areas, it slowly slithers around in a constant search for warm places.

name: Pansear

name: Fennekin

attacks.name: Firebreathing

name: Braixen

description: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.

name: Delphox

description: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. It waters plants with it using its tail.

name: Froakie

attacks.name: Aqua Wave
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.

name: Greninja

description: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.
name: Clauncher

description: A Pokémon with a persistent nature, it chases its chosen prey until the prey becomes exhausted.
name: Poochyena

description: It will always obey the commands of a skilled Trainer. Its behavior arises from its living in packs in ancient times.

attacks.name: Hard Bite
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Mightyena

description: Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.
name: Inkay

description: Blades comprise this Pokémon's entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.
name: Pawniard

description: This pitiless Pokémon commands a group of Pawniard to hound prey into immobility. It then moves in to finish the prey off.

attacks.name: Wicked Jab
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Bisharp

description: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.

name: Honedge

description: It has an active, playful nature. Many women like to frolic with it because of its affectionate ways.
name: Snubbull

description: It is timid in spite of its looks. If it becomes enraged, however, it will strike with its huge fangs.

name: Farfetch'd

description: If it is around babies, it milk it produces contains much more nutrition than usual.

effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
name: Crushing Hammer
